name: Crater
description: The moon’s surface mapped crater by crater — rims catch the light on one side while every redraw re-cuts the basins.

code.style: --basin: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color1)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(34%, 72%); left: @rand(6%, 30%); top: @rand(6%, 30%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--basin); box-shadow: inset calc(12px / @Y) calc(14px / @Y) 0 rgba(40, 44, 52, 0.35), calc(-8px / @Y) calc(-8px / @Y) 0 var(--color3); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.2) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(10%, 18%); left: @rand(60%, 76%); top: @rand(58%, 76%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color2); opacity: 0.8; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
